# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source should enter the institute as a serious research artifact candidate.

## Why

The source is a research manuscript on arXiv and the excerpt shows real empirical substance rather than commentary: it studies 466 open-source software projects, describes a concrete repository selection and filtering methodology, and reports results on adoption, information structure, and evolution of AGENTS.md and related AI configuration files. That meets the admission bar for a serious preprint with real measured observational results.

## Limits
